## Summary
<!-- Provide a short summary of the change -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] DevOps / CI/CD

## Areas Affected
<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] Frontend (apps/web)
- [ ] Backend services
- [ ] Database / migrations
- [ ] Infrastructure / K8s / Terraform

## Testing
<!-- Describe how you tested this change -->
- [ ] Unit tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Typecheck passes (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Tested in local Docker Compose
- [ ] Tested in staging environment

## Deployment Considerations
<!-- For DevOps and infra changes -->
- [ ] Requires database migration
- [ ] Requires secret rotation
- [ ] Requires infrastructure change (Terraform / K8s)
- [ ] Requires feature flag toggle
- [ ] Has canary / blue-green deployment plan

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] Relevant CODEOWNERS reviewers added
